class.name: SpineIkConstraint
class.brief_description: Stores the current pose for an IK constraint.
class.description:
Stores the current pose for an IK constraint. An IK constraint adjusts the rotation of 1 or 2 constrained bones so the tip of the last bone is as close to the target bone as possible.
See [url=http://esotericsoftware.com/spine-ik-constraints]IK constraints[/url] in the Spine User Guide.

method.name: update
method.description: Updates the constraint. The IK constraint is solved by adjusting the rotation of the bones so the tip of the last bone is as close to the target as possible.

method.name: get_data
method.description: Returns the IK constraint's setup pose data.

method.name: get_bones
method.description: Returns the bones that will be modified by this IK constraint. Modifying the array has no effect.

method.name: get_target
method.description: Returns the bone that is the target for the IK constraint. The bones will be rotated so the tip of the last bone is as close to the target as possible.

method.name: set_target
method.description: Sets the bone that is the target for the IK constraint. The bones will be rotated so the tip of the last bone is as close to the target as possible.

method.name: get_pose
method.description: Returns the current pose for this IK constraint, containing mix, softness, bend direction, compress, and stretch values.

method.name: get_applied_pose
method.description: Returns the applied pose for this IK constraint.

method.name: is_active
method.description: Returns whether this IK constraint is active. When inactive, the constraint is not applied.

method.name: set_active
method.description: Sets whether this IK constraint is active. When inactive, the constraint is not applied.
